emails.subject: Re: Original Guarantees
emails.body: Re: Original Guarantees Tana: Does this include original Enron Corp. guarantees? On the physical side, we have the counterparty sign the Enron Corp. document and therefore have an original. Let me know. Thanks, Jeff Tana Jones 06/21/00 01:48 PM
